$comment: Single source of truth for the coordinated release. The npm packages all publish at `version` (sync mode — see RELEASING.md). The model identity (which trained artifact + tokenizer the neural-weights-* packages bundle) lives under `weights`, decoupled from the artifact's historical filename. Paths are relative to `weights.dataRoot` (override the root with MAILWOMAN_DATA_ROOT, or the individual files with MAILWOMAN_PUBLISH_MODEL / MAILWOMAN_PUBLISH_TOKENIZER). Bump `version` here in lockstep with the release; copy-weights.ts, the ship script, and the model card all read this instead of hardcoding the numbers.

weights.lineage: v2.2.0-full-family (v5.3.0) — the FIRST ground-up from-scratch train on the spliced nsplice vocab (v0.8-era schedule, 100k steps, corpus v0.10.0: 698 shards incl. the four-orthography leading-name-boundary family @6.0 — fr-bare-street/si-bare-village/no-street-led/cz-pcfirst-preposition; tokenizer v0.7.1-nsplice UNCHANGED from v5.2.0, so this is a model-only bump). Archived NO-PROMOTE 2026-07-03 under the pre-#942 calculus; PROMOTED 2026-07-04 after the re-gate on the #942-floored stack (operator fork, #901): the shipped v5.2.0 pair had a severe ungated bare-AND-anchored FR street fragmentation (#949: 16/40 bare, 13/40 anchored, 'Allée'→'e' at the é piece boundary — no fr.street floor existed) which v2.2.0 fixes outright (34/40 bare, 37/40 anchored). Re-gate (fresh dumps both arms, same stack): US-2k ni PASS (p50 3.27 identical), FR-3k ni PASS deconfounded (1.30km both), CZ wrong-city 13.7→6.6%, SK 13.3→6.6%, PL 7.1→6.2%; SE +4.6pp resolve and Åbo 0.12km vs 859km from the original battery. TRADES (operator-approved, stated): SI wrong-city 8.7→11.4% (+2.7pp; resolve −1.5pp) — floored model-independently by postalCompoundRecovery (#942, default-ON; candidate+floor recovers all 55 composition-lost rows); fr.postcode label 99.2 (floor revised 99.3→99.2, gate v5.3.0-family.json); int8 homograph quantization delta 2.4 vs the 1.5 cap (fp32 passes all floors; int8 homograph 85.1 clears 83.3) — per-artifact exception, cap unchanged. int8 md5 a64ad2e6b9ee73a6b63f3c94c01b1966; fp32 0876031351…; evidence: gate-v193/RESULTS.md + gate-v220-regate/ + #901/#949.

softFeed.$comment: Soft-feed artifacts (#718 D1) materialized into each neural-weights-<locale> workspace at publish time by copy-weights.ts so the library default `loadFromWeights` feeds the channels the anchor+gazetteer-trained model expects (closing the anchor-OFF crater). The PCB1 postcode binary is built from the WOF postcode shard (per locale's country code); the gazetteer lexicon is the codex-generated repo file. Paths under `db` are relative to weights.dataRoot/wof. Like the weights binaries, these are skipped in CI (MAILWOMAN_SKIP_WEIGHTS_COPY) — the publish workflow places them via the HF fetch step.

assets.$comment: Where the model release lives for the demo + the CI weights pull. The release path embeds `version`; publish.yml derives the same path from the model card so CI and local stay in sync.
